messages.content: What search query should I use on Wikipedia to answer the query "How to eat an oyster?". Respond with only the search query string, and nothing else. The search query:
The search query to answer the query "How to eat an oyster" is "How to eat an oyster".
What search query should I use on Wikipedia to answer the query "Can you explain to me what is Streamlit?". Respond with only the search query string, and nothing else. The search query:
The search query to answer the query "Can you explain to me what is Streamlit?" is "What is Streamlit?".
What search query should I use on Wikipedia to answer the query "Is Nelson Mandela alive?". Respond with only the search query string, and nothing else. The search query:
The search query to answer the query "Is Nelson Mandela alive?" is "Nelson Mandela is alive?".
